import unreal
abp='/Game/Character/ABP_Bodycam'
AG=unreal.AnimGraphService
BP=unreal.BlueprintService
log=[]
def step(name, fn):
    try:
        r=fn()
        log.append((name, r))
    except Exception as e:
        log.append((name, 'EXC: %s'%e))

# --- 1) variables ---
step('var AimYaw', lambda: BP.add_variable(abp,'AimYaw','float','0.0') if not BP.variable_exists(abp,'AimYaw') else 'exists')
step('var WalkPlayRate', lambda: BP.add_variable(abp,'WalkPlayRate','float','1.0') if not BP.variable_exists(abp,'WalkPlayRate') else 'exists')
step('compile1', lambda: BP.compile_blueprint(abp))

# --- 2) smoother transitions ---
step('blend idle->walk', lambda: AG.set_transition_blend(abp,'Locomotion','Idle','Walk',0.18,'CubicInOut'))
step('blend walk->idle', lambda: AG.set_transition_blend(abp,'Locomotion','Walk','Idle',0.50,'CubicInOut'))

# --- 3) configure existing Head ModifyBone: additive rotation in component space ---
MB_HEAD='732C69FB4B2BBCA7C240C9980E47A925'
L2C='7BD04BDC487A58EC132E32BC50124B4D'
C2L='3A5E9DB44A9E64AD2D0C439CD1D98101'
MKROT='CB347EB24E8BF245E39DCC90C59C82F4'
GET_PITCH='A2A0A5C04451603207882099C989C0A4'
for prop,val in [('RotationMode','BMM_Additive'),('RotationSpace','BCS_ComponentSpace'),('TranslationMode','BMM_Ignore'),('ScaleMode','BMM_Ignore')]:
    step('head cfg %s'%prop, lambda p=prop,v=val: BP.configure_node(abp,'AnimGraph',MB_HEAD,p,v))
step('head alpha 0.65', lambda: BP.set_node_pin_value(abp,'AnimGraph',MB_HEAD,'Alpha','0.65'))

# --- 4) wire AimYaw into the shared MakeRotator ---
gy=[None]
step('get AimYaw node', lambda: gy.__setitem__(0, BP.add_get_variable_node(abp,'AnimGraph','AimYaw',-50,350)))
step('AimYaw->Rot.Yaw', lambda: BP.connect_nodes(abp,'AnimGraph',gy[0],'AimYaw',MKROT,'Yaw'))

# --- 5) Spine2 ModifyBone for natural torso bend (35% of the aim) ---
mbs=[None]
step('add MB Spine2', lambda: mbs.__setitem__(0, AG.add_modify_bone_node(abp,'AnimGraph','Spine2',180,-150)))
for prop,val in [('RotationMode','BMM_Additive'),('RotationSpace','BCS_ComponentSpace'),('TranslationMode','BMM_Ignore'),('ScaleMode','BMM_Ignore')]:
    step('spine cfg %s'%prop, lambda p=prop,v=val: BP.configure_node(abp,'AnimGraph',mbs[0],p,v))
step('spine alpha 0.35', lambda: BP.set_node_pin_value(abp,'AnimGraph',mbs[0],'Alpha','0.35'))
step('rot->spine.Rotation', lambda: BP.connect_nodes(abp,'AnimGraph',MKROT,'ReturnValue',mbs[0],'Rotation'))
# rewire pose chain: L2C -> Spine2 -> Head
step('disc L2C out', lambda: AG.disconnect_anim_node(abp,'AnimGraph',L2C,'ComponentPose'))
step('L2C->Spine2', lambda: AG.connect_anim_nodes(abp,'AnimGraph',L2C,'ComponentPose',mbs[0],'ComponentPose'))
step('Spine2->Head', lambda: AG.connect_anim_nodes(abp,'AnimGraph',mbs[0],'Pose',MB_HEAD,'ComponentPose'))

# --- 6) walk play rate synced to speed ---
walk_nodes = BP.get_nodes_in_graph(abp,'Walk')
seq_id=None
for n in walk_nodes:
    if 'SequencePlayer' in str(n.node_type):
        seq_id=str(n.node_id)
log.append(('walk seq node', seq_id))
if seq_id:
    gpr=[None]
    step('get WalkPlayRate node', lambda: gpr.__setitem__(0, BP.add_get_variable_node(abp,'Walk','WalkPlayRate',-250,200)))
    step('PlayRate wire', lambda: BP.connect_nodes(abp,'Walk',gpr[0],'WalkPlayRate',seq_id,'PlayRate'))

# --- 7) compile + validate + save ---
step('compile2', lambda: BP.compile_blueprint(abp))
v=AG.validate_state_machine(abp,'Locomotion')
log.append(('validate', '%s errors=%s warnings=%s'%(v.is_valid,[str(e) for e in v.errors],[str(w) for w in v.warnings])))
step('save', lambda: unreal.EditorAssetLibrary.save_asset(abp, only_if_is_dirty=False))
for name,r in log:
    print('%-22s : %s'%(name,r))
